nodes.summary: `src/config.ts` is the central configuration resolver and environment factory for the application, responsible for orchestrating agent home directory isolation, MCP server mapping, and system prompt retrieval.

`src/test-local.ts` is the central diagnostic entry point and verification orchestrator — it consumes system configurations and agent definitions to validate environment integrity, role prompt availability, and external connectivity via the OpenRouter bridge.

`src/index.ts` is the primary entry point and MCP (Model Context Protocol) server orchestrator — it registers tool definitions, dispatches incoming requests to the consultation pipeline, and manages the lifecycle of child processes.

`test-full-consult.ts` is the central diagnostic entry point and high-PageRank verification harness for the multi-agent consultation pipeline — it orchestrates environment initialization, configuration resolution, and triggers the full-cycle execution of the consultation orchestrator.

`src/test-agents-time.ts` is the performance diagnostic entry point and high-PageRank integration validator for the multi-agent system — it orchestrates the measurement of agent response latency, success rates, and output quality by consuming the `consult-orchestrator` and `config` modules.

`runDirectMcpCall` is the central diagnostic entry point and integration test harness for the MCP (Model Context Protocol) subsystem — it orchestrates the lifecycle of a child process, manages raw JSON-RPC communication over stdio, and validates tool execution.

`src/openrouter-client.ts` is the central network adapter and communication gateway for the system — it acts as the high-PageRank bridge between the application logic and the OpenRouter API, orchestrating request dispatching, retry logic, liveness verification, and model-specific configuration mapping.

`consult-orchestrator.ts` is the central orchestrator for the multi-agent consultation pipeline — it sequences agent discovery, local CLI execution, remote API dispatching, personality injection, and final synthesis of analytical results.

`src/analyze-project.ts` is the central entry point and high-PageRank orchestrator for the project-wide auditing pipeline — it sequences configuration resolution, environment setup, and multi-agent consultation execution to produce a comprehensive technical analysis report.

`testSecurityAuditor` is the central diagnostic entry point and high-PageRank verification harness for the security auditing subsystem — it consumes environment configurations and orchestrates multi-agent consultations to validate the `security_auditor` role logic.

`test-skills-check.ts` is the diagnostic entry point and high-PageRank integration validator — it orchestrates the verification of agent environment isolation by consuming configuration services and triggering the `runConsultation` pipeline to probe agent awareness of local host resources.

`testDynamicMcp` is the high-PageRank diagnostic orchestrator and integration test entry point — it validates the dynamic generation of MCP (Model Context Protocol) configurations by consuming the `config.js` environment factory and verifying agent-specific filesystem state.

tour.title: Project Overview and Entry Point
tour.description: Start by reviewing the project documentation to understand the system's purpose, then examine the main entry point to see how the application initializes.

tour.title: Configuration and Environment
tour.description: Understand how the system manages settings and environment variables, which are crucial for orchestrating the various agents and integrations.

tour.title: MCP Protocol Infrastructure
tour.description: Explore the core communication layer that enables the system to interact with Model Context Protocol servers and external AI clients like OpenRouter.

tour.title: Orchestration and Logic
tour.description: Dive into the orchestrator, which manages the lifecycle of agents and coordinates complex tasks across the system.

tour.title: System Integration and Testing
tour.description: Examine the testing suite to understand how the system validates its own components, manages child processes, and ensures security compliance.

tour.title: Skills and Personality Framework
tour.description: Learn how the system defines agent capabilities and behavioral archetypes, which dictate how the AI interacts with the codebase.
